meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: The Advanced Guide for Students
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Master debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code. A high-level checklist for students building production-grade SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting fragmented AI workflows. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based debugging, you transform AI from a distraction into a force multiplier. This structured approach allows you to isolate logic errors, optimize state management, and ship robust code faster than ever before.
content.intro:
The modern developer’s workspace is a graveyard of half-finished abstractions and 'AI-hallucinated' bugs. You start with a simple feature, only to find yourself drowning in a sea of conflicting AI suggestions, broken dependencies, and code that works in the prompt but fails in production. The cognitive load is immense, and the feeling of being overwhelmed is the silent killer of student passion projects.

But there is a way out of the fog. By treating AI not as a magic black box, but as a systematic debugging partner, you regain control of your codebase. This guide moves beyond basic prompting, teaching you how to architect a professional-grade debugging loop that turns a chaotic development environment into a streamlined, high-velocity engine.

steps.title: Establish the Architectural Baseline
steps.description: Before debugging, you must identify the structural integrity of your code. Antigravity helps visualize dependencies and logic flows that standard IDEs miss.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for circular dependencies and state management bottlenecks. Output a dependency map and identify the top 3 high-risk modules.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Vector
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform targeted regression testing on the specific module identified in the architectural review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of edge-case test vectors for the authentication module. Focus on race conditions and token expiration scenarios.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Inject your error logs into the AI to find the discrepancy between expected behavior and reality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the provided error stack trace with the current implementation. Explain why the state mutation is failing in the async block.

steps.title: Iterative Patching and Verification
steps.description: Apply fixes incrementally rather than refactoring the whole file. Maintain strict version control throughout the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a minimal patch for the identified race condition. Ensure the solution adheres to existing interface patterns.

steps.title: Final Production-Grade Audit
steps.description: Perform a final sweep to ensure the fix hasn't introduced downstream side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a security and performance audit on the patched module. Verify that no new memory leaks were introduced.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context Window Journal' to track what the AI knows about your specific project constraints.
Use Claude Code's `--memory` flag to persist architectural decisions across long debugging sessions.
Treat Antigravity prompts like API documentation; be explicit about the 'expected output format' to avoid verbose fluff.
Never accept an AI-generated fix without asking it to explain the 'why' behind the change.
Use a local Git branch per debugging task to ensure you can revert immediately if the AI introduces a hallucination.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Devs: https://promptingguide.ai
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, integrate these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the initial analysis phase for every pull request.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace the competition and build software that actually scales. Stop guessing and start engineering with precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
